What Posse’s are generally good to get?

Tricky to answer. Most of the generically good posses are stuff like mouses wisdom which you unlock very early in the story. There are a fair amount of dps characters that prefer having their own posse, but those are a little more niche.
Team dependent
Generally good is myriam posse thay draws 2 arith 2, - 5 energy
Daily reset in 34 mins
SOON
The best generic ones you should already have; Mouse Wisdom and Little Wish. The only other one you'd have to go out of your way for is the one that comes from Miryam's side story.
Similarly, other strong options also come from main story progression.

The only ones you'd go out of your way for to use on specific characters come from that specific character's side story, and you generally don't have to question that because if you like the character you're drawn to do the side content for them...
